tools.name: fecred_accept_invoice
tools.description: Accept a received electronic credit invoice (Factura de Credito Electronica MiPyME) and its cuenta corriente balance. **IRREVERSIBLE LEGAL ACT: confirm with the user before calling. Restate the emisor

tools.name: fecred_check_obligation
tools.description: Check if an invoice to a given CUIT must be a Factura de Credito Electronica MiPyME (FCE). Use BEFORE issuing a factura to a large buyer: if obligado=true and the invoice total is at or above montoDes

tools.name: fecred_health
tools.description: Ping the AFIP WSFECred service (dummy operation). Returns appServer/dbServer/authServer statuses. Use to confirm WSFECred is reachable + your WSAA token still works before a batch flow.

tools.name: fecred_list_received
tools.description: List Facturas de Credito Electronica (FCE) received or emitted by the represented CUIT. Default rol='Receptor' + estadoCmp='Recepcionado' lists FCEs awaiting your acceptance or rejection. IMPORTANT: a

tools.name: fecred_reject_invoice
tools.description: Reject a received electronic credit invoice (Factura de Credito Electronica MiPyME), with at least one motivo de rechazo plus justification. **IRREVERSIBLE LEGAL ACT: confirm with the user before call
